author: Aryan Bhosale
name: Autoresearch: Heads4 + Step-based LR + Sliding Window
blurb: Built on the SOTA (10L, int5/int6, BigramHash, SmearGate, SWA) with automated experiment loop (50+ experiments across Mac MLX and CUDA). Key improvements: NUM_HEADS=4 with head_dim=128 (-0.095 BPB relative improvement), step-based LR schedule, MATRIX_LR=0.03, BigramHash(16384), sliding window eval stride=256. Tested on 1xH100 only — requesting compute grant for 8xH100 validation.
note: 1xH100 result (800 steps, sliding window eval stride=256). Artifact is 17.4MB (over 16MB limit due to head_dim=128 increasing params). Needs int4/int5 MLP compression to fit. Non-record submission — requesting compute grant for 8xH100 validation.
